title: v5.4.29 Music System
summary: Added a full Discord music system with play, queue, search, playlists, controls, autoplay, and per-server settings. Changed the default text search provider to YouTube Music so /play starts from music-focused results. Added the last Lavalink playback error to /music diagnose for faster troubleshooting.

cards.commit: Add secure Lavalink poToken client support
